movie.actors: Charlie Sheen, Hilary Duff, Eva Longoria, Wayne Brady
movie.genre: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Mystery, Sci-Fi
movie.plot: When the supermarket closes at night, the contents inside come to life! The shop becomes a living world for Dex Dogtective and all other creatures inside it at night time. However, with the new Brand X coming into the store, things take a turn for the worst.
movie.title: Foodfight!
movie.writer: Lawrence Kasanoff (story), Joshua Wexler (story), Brent V. Friedman (screenplay), Rebecca Swanson (screenplay), Sean Catherine Derek (screenplay), Lawrence Kasanoff (screenplay)
